### AI Spend Audit Summary

Your team of **5** is currently spending **$110/month** on AI utilities. We have identified concrete optimizations that will reduce this to **$60/month**, instantly returning **$50/month** (**$600/year**) to your cash reserves.

- **Biggest Leak:** The primary source of overspending is **ChatGPT**, where you could instantly save **$40/month** by adjusting your Plus plan.
- **Strategy:** Standardizing your engineering workflows onto Cursor Pro and cancelling standalone Copilot licenses is the most impactful immediate optimization.
- **Action Plan:** Switch plan tiers to match active team seat counts and delete duplicate tools immediately to capture these savings.
